pi_items.source: https://www.ssga.com/us/en/intermediary/capabilities/spdr-core-equity-etfs/spy-sp-500 (official State Street SPDR), Yahoo Finance, and verified against SPY.Last.txt in environment data directory
https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpGuides/nt8/chart_styles.htm (NinjaTrader 8 chart period types support weekly timeframes)

pi_items.verified_value: 700 is a valid parameter value (NinjaTrader accepts integer days); environment data contains 502 trading days (~2 years, 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31)
pi_items.source: https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/daystoload.htm (DaysToLoad is int parameter in NinjaScript); SPY.Last.txt contains 502 trading days from 2023-2024

pi_items.verified_value: 40 is a valid SMA period (common periods are 10, 20, 50, 200; 40 is a standard custom period)

pi_items.source: env.json specifies user account named 'Docker'; Windows default Documents folder is C:\Users\{username}\Documents\

privileged_info_summary: SPY is the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust, a real widely-traded ETF tracking the S&P 500 Index. The task targets a real financial instrument with authentic 2023-2024 historical price data (502 trading days, 2023-01-03 to 2024-12-31) from Yahoo Finance integrated into the environment. NinjaTrader 8 natively supports all required configuration features: Weekly chart periods, logarithmic axis scaling, and Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator with configurable periods. The workspace directory (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces) is the standard NinjaTrader 8 default location on Windows. The task configuration parameters (700 days load, SMA period 40) are both valid NinjaTrader values within documented parameter ranges.
